top_10.rationale: Direct PDF — 'Using Asyncio in Python 3' (Caleb Hattingh, O'Reilly) hosted on Archive.org. Book-length treatment of asyncio event loop machinery and concurrency model. Top PDF hit for the topic.
Direct Springer PDF — 'Concurrency with AsyncIO' book chapter. Covers asyncio.run() and event loop management, direct PDF of a published book chapter on asyncio concurrency.

Direct conference PDF — 'Event-driven Programming with Python asyncio'. Covers event loop architecture, coroutines, and sequential-looking async code execution. Directly matches 'event loop concurrency'.
Direct PyCon DE 2018 PDF — 'Concurrency in Python: Concepts, frameworks and best practices'. Covers asyncio event loop I/O switching pattern and concurrency frameworks. Direct conference PDF.
Direct PDF — 'Python Concurrency with asyncio' by Matthew Fowler. Full book PDF covering the asyncio single-threaded concurrency model, event loop, and APIs.
GitHub-hosted PDF — 'Python Concurrency with asyncio'. Same definitive book via GitHub PDF viewer; event loop and concurrency coverage.
Springer book chapter 'Working with Event Loops' — directly covers asyncio event loop orchestration of callbacks and asynchronous tasks in Python 3.4+. Has Springer PDF available.
Scribd 'Mastering Python Asyncio Essentials | PDF' — comprehensive PDF guide covering coroutines, event loops, non-blocking I/O, and concurrency patterns in asyncio.
WeLib 'Python Concurrency with asyncio (PDF, 6.4 MB)' — PDF download page for the Fowler book; labeled PDF with size confirmation.
Sciarium 'Download Fowler Matthew. Python Concurrency with asyncio [PDF]' — PDF download link for the asyncio concurrency book; PDF-mode landing page.
